meta.title: 30-Day Mobile Puzzle Monetization Bootcamp for Unity Developers
meta.audience: Unity mobile developers building Android-first, iOS-aware puzzle games with ads plus light IAP.
meta.capstone: One-page monetization plan with placements, IAP ladder, tracking, guardrails and next action.
meta.format: 25-35 minute workshop lessons with decision artifacts.

references.title: Google AdMob Unity quick start
references.note: Unity integration entry point for mobile ad monetization.

references.title: Google AdMob Unity privacy strategies
references.note: Consent and privacy implementation considerations for Unity games using ads.

references.title: Unity In-App Purchasing package
references.note: Unity package documentation for product configuration and purchase flows.

references.title: Google Play Billing overview
references.note: Android billing concepts that shape IAP implementation and compliance.

references.title: Apple auto-renewable subscriptions
references.note: Subscription design, offers, retention and platform rules for iOS.

references.title: Google Play Data safety
references.note: Store disclosure expectations for SDKs and collected data.

lessons.title: Monetization as a player-value loop
lessons.summary: Frame ads and IAP as a value exchange tied to puzzle motivation, session rhythm and trust.
lessons.learningOutcome: Decide what the game is allowed to monetize before adding SDKs or offers.

lessons.title: Puzzle economy roles: ads, IAP and progression
lessons.summary: Separate helper, convenience, cosmetic and content roles so monetization does not damage puzzle clarity.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose the monetization role that matches the puzzle loop and target player.

lessons.title: Audience willingness-to-pay map
lessons.summary: Map player motivations to likely ad tolerance and purchase triggers without guessing demographics.
lessons.learningOutcome: Identify which players should see ads, offers or neither in the first test.

lessons.title: Session design for ad-friendly puzzle games
lessons.summary: Place ad opportunities around natural puzzle breaks instead of interrupting solve flow.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose where ads can appear without breaking player trust.

lessons.title: First monetization hypothesis
lessons.summary: Compress value, placement, metric and next action into one testable monetization hypothesis.
lessons.learningOutcome: Write the first monetization hypothesis that can drive implementation.

lessons.title: Ads format choice for Unity puzzle
lessons.summary: Compare rewarded, interstitial, banner and app-open ads for early puzzle prototypes.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose a first ad format based on player control, session rhythm and measurement quality.

lessons.title: Week 1 synthesis: monetization guardrails
lessons.summary: Turn the first week into non-negotiable rules for trust, pacing and test scope.
lessons.learningOutcome: Define what monetization must not do to the game experience.

lessons.title: Ad SDK integration plan without gameplay coupling
lessons.summary: Plan Unity ad integration with events, services and ScriptableObject config instead of gameplay/UI coupling.
lessons.learningOutcome: Decide the technical boundary for ad loading, showing and analytics.

lessons.title: Rewarded ad placement and reward economy
lessons.summary: Design rewarded ads where the reward helps recovery or convenience without becoming mandatory.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose one rewarded placement and define its reward rules.

lessons.title: Interstitial pacing and fatigue control
lessons.summary: Set interstitial timing with cooldowns, session caps and fail-safe rules.
lessons.learningOutcome: Write a pacing rule that protects retention before revenue.

lessons.title: IAP product ladder for puzzle games
lessons.summary: Build a small product ladder from starter pack to convenience pack without bloating SKU count.
lessons.learningOutcome: Select the minimum viable IAP catalog for a soft launch.

lessons.title: Store products and receipt readiness
lessons.summary: Plan Android-first IAP setup and receipt validation assumptions before live testing.
lessons.learningOutcome: Decide which store-product readiness checks block a monetization test.

lessons.title: Monetization event taxonomy
lessons.summary: Define events for ad request, impression, reward, purchase attempt and purchase result.
lessons.learningOutcome: Create the minimum event set needed to read monetization safely.

lessons.title: QA monetization in Unity release builds
lessons.summary: Validate ads, purchases, consent and events in a real Android release build before spend.
lessons.learningOutcome: Decide whether the build is monetization-test ready.

lessons.title: Week 2 synthesis: monetization test build
lessons.summary: Summarize integration, placements, events and QA into a single acceptance card.
lessons.learningOutcome: Define the pass/fail rules for a monetization-ready build.

lessons.title: ARPDAU, impressions and fill rate
lessons.summary: Read ARPDAU through impressions, eCPM, fill, show rate and session depth.
lessons.learningOutcome: Diagnose whether weak ad revenue is demand, placement or engagement.

lessons.title: Purchase funnel from offer view to paid user
lessons.summary: Break IAP performance into offer exposure, intent, checkout and successful purchase.
lessons.learningOutcome: Identify which purchase-funnel link needs fixing first.

lessons.title: Retention vs monetization tradeoff
lessons.summary: Separate good revenue from revenue that quietly damages D1/D7 retention.
lessons.learningOutcome: Set guardrails for monetization changes that should be rolled back.

lessons.title: Cohort reading for ads plus light IAP
lessons.summary: Read revenue and retention by install cohort instead of blending noisy users.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose which cohort signal is strong enough for a next action.

lessons.title: Ad mediation and waterfall basics
lessons.summary: Understand when mediation is helpful and when it is premature for a small puzzle test.
lessons.learningOutcome: Decide whether to keep one network or prepare mediation later.

lessons.title: Monetization dashboard readout
lessons.summary: Create a daily readout that combines retention, ads, purchases and technical health.
lessons.learningOutcome: Write the first dashboard readout without overclaiming from small data.

lessons.title: Week 3 synthesis: metric decision rules
lessons.summary: Convert metric patterns into iterate, hold, rollback or expand decisions.
lessons.learningOutcome: Define how monetization metrics will trigger action.

lessons.title: Offer design: starter packs and boosters
lessons.summary: Design a starter offer that solves a clear player problem without paywalling fun.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose one offer concept and its player-value proof.

lessons.title: Ad removal and no-ads offers
lessons.summary: Decide whether no-ads fits the game and how it changes future ad economics.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose whether to test no-ads now, later or never.

lessons.title: Pricing and regional assumptions
lessons.summary: Set simple price tiers and regional assumptions without pretending early data is precise.
lessons.learningOutcome: Pick first price points and caveats for Android-first testing.

lessons.title: LiveOps cadence for monetization tests
lessons.summary: Plan weekly tests, cooldowns and readouts so economy changes do not thrash the game.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose the first four-week monetization operating rhythm.

lessons.title: Compliance, consent and data safety
lessons.summary: Connect ad SDKs, IAP, consent and store disclosure to launch readiness.
lessons.learningOutcome: Decide which compliance tasks must block release.

lessons.title: Monetization post-mortem and learning log
lessons.summary: Turn weak or strong results into reusable learning instead of dashboard archaeology.
lessons.learningOutcome: Write a monetization post-mortem that leads to the next test.

lessons.title: Build the one-page monetization plan
lessons.summary: Assemble value exchange, placements, events, offers, metrics and guardrails.
lessons.learningOutcome: Create a one-page monetization plan ready for team review.

lessons.title: Stress-test monetization risks and next action
lessons.summary: Stress-test the plan and choose the smallest action that reduces the largest risk.
lessons.learningOutcome: Choose launch, hold, reduce scope or rollback before touching live players.
